====''Pokémon the Series: Diamond and Pearl''====
Bertha was first mentioned by [[Lucian]] in ''[[DP035|An Elite Meet and Greet!]]'', along with the other members of the [[Sinnoh]] [[Elite Four]] and the {{pkmn|Champion|League Champion}} {{an|Cynthia}}. She was mentioned again in ''[[DP099|A Trainer and Child Reunion!]]'' by an [[Officer Jenny]].

She physically appeared in ''[[DP170|An Elite Coverup!]]'', where she, along with {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}}, helped [[Roland]] get his {{p|Magby}} back from {{TRT}}. After chasing them with her {{wp|Sport utility vehicle|SUV}}, the group battled Team Rock and Roland was reunited with Magby. Later, Bertha had a {{pkmn|battle}} with Ash, using her {{p|Hippowdon}} against his {{AP|Torterra}}, and she managed to defeat him.
